task_completion.description: Verify the title of the Goodfellow (2014) paper has been updated to indicate retraction.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Zotero UI (middle pane list or right pane Info tab), the title for the paper by Goodfellow et al. must exactly start with 'RETRACTED: Generative Adversarial Nets'.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'retracted' tag has been added to the Goodfellow (2014) paper.
task_completion.visual_evidence: With the Goodfellow paper selected, the right pane's 'Tags' tab or the bottom of the item pane should display the tag 'retracted' (all lowercase).

task_completion.description: Verify the Extra field of the Goodfellow (2014) paper has been updated.
task_completion.visual_evidence: With the Goodfellow paper selected, the right pane's 'Info' tab must show 'Status: Retracted' in the 'Extra' field.

task_completion.description: Verify the title of the LeCun (2015) paper has been updated to indicate retraction.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Zotero UI (middle pane list or right pane Info tab), the title for the paper by LeCun et al. must exactly start with 'RETRACTED: Deep Learning' (or 'RETRACTED: Deep learning').

task_completion.description: Verify the 'retracted' tag has been added to the LeCun (2015) paper.
task_completion.visual_evidence: With the LeCun paper selected, the right pane's 'Tags' tab or the bottom of the item pane should display the tag 'retracted' (all lowercase).

task_completion.description: Verify the Extra field of the LeCun (2015) paper has been updated.
task_completion.visual_evidence: With the LeCun paper selected, the right pane's 'Info' tab must show 'Status: Retracted' in the 'Extra' field.

integrity.description: The agent used the Zotero graphical user interface to make the changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Zotero application window open and being interacted with, rather than just a text editor or terminal.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the UI by directly modifying the Zotero SQLite database via terminal commands.
integrity.visual_evidence: Terminal windows should not show direct `sqlite3 zotero.sqlite` UPDATE commands to change titles, tags, or extra fields.

integrity.description: The agent modified the existing papers rather than creating new dummy items.
integrity.visual_evidence: The modified items should still retain their original metadata (e.g., authors 'Goodfellow'/'LeCun', years '2014'/'2015', publication venues) in the Info tab.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Paper 1: 'Generative Adversarial Nets' by Ian J. Goodfellow (2014). Target Paper 2: 'Deep Learning' (or 'Deep learning') by Yann LeCun (2015). Required modifications for BOTH papers: 1) Title must be prefixed with exactly 'RETRACTED: ' (with the space). 2) A tag exactly matching 'retracted' (lowercase) must be added. 3) The 'Extra' field must contain exactly 'Status: Retracted'. Note: The retraction scenario is fictional for this task; do not look for real-world retraction notices, only verify the requested UI changes.
